summary: Iteration 83 - CaptureSession Unified Model Testing Complete. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend On-Demand tab and Live Sessions tab functional. Grom Parent permissions verified.

minor.issue: Profile model missing 'rating' and 'total_reviews' fields - FIXED by using getattr with defaults

on_demand_tab_loads.details: On-Demand tab in /bookings page loads correctly with location info card and empty state when no photographers available

on_demand_photographers_api.details: /api/photographers/on-demand returns photographers with correct structure including resolution pricing (web/standard/high)

session_pricing_endpoint.details: /api/sessions/pricing returns correct pricing for all modes: live_join (entry_fee=$25), on_demand (entry_fee=$75), gallery (entry_fee=$0)

resolution_pricing_tiers.details: Resolution pricing (web=$3, standard=$5, high=$10) correctly returned in pricing endpoint and on-demand photographers list

grom_parent_can_access_live_sessions.details: Grom Parent can access Live Sessions tab and see 'See Live Photographers' button

grom_parent_cannot_go_live.details: Grom Parent cannot create sessions - /api/photographer/{id}/go-live returns 403 with message 'Grom Parents cannot start Live Sessions'

photos_credit_remaining_field.details: LiveSessionParticipant model has photos_credit_remaining field, assigned from buy-in in join_session

participant_role_field.details: LiveSessionParticipant model has participant_role field ('participant' or 'grom_buyer')

account_credit_toggle.details: OnDemandRequestDrawer has Account Credit toggle in payment step - shows when user.credit_balance > 0

critical_code_review_comments: On-Demand tab requires geolocation access - shows 'No Photographers Available' when location denied (expected behavior)
Profile model doesn't have 'rating' and 'total_reviews' fields - fixed with getattr defaults in on-demand endpoint
All CaptureSession unified fields (session_mode, dispatch_request_id, booking_id, participant_role, photos_credit_remaining, resolution_preference, parent_buyer_id) are present in models
seed_data_creation: Created test_ondemand_pro@test.com (Approved Pro) with on_demand_available=true for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CaptureSession Unified Model is fully implemented. Key endpoints: /api/photographers/on-demand (returns photographers with resolution pricing), /api/sessions/pricing (returns context-based pricing for live_join/on_demand/gallery modes), /api/photographer/{id}/go-live (blocks Grom Parents). Frontend On-Demand tab requires geolocation access. Test user test_ondemand_pro@test.com is available for on-demand testing.
